style_base: contemplative morning lusophone poetry, soft golden hour light, cinematic film grain 35mm, warm radiant earth tones cream gold honey light, shallow depth of field, no people no faces no text no logos

mood_hints.birds_dawn: distant birds and very subtle leaf movement
mood_hints.stream: water surface gently rippling, slow current
mood_hints.wind: soft wind through grass or curtains, slow drift
mood_hints.rain: light rain on glass or stone, slow droplets
mood_hints.silence: almost still, only dust particles drifting in light
